core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix hacker aesthetics with Swiss precision.
Emotion First: The editor should feel like a cockpit—precise, fast, and powerful.
Content is King: The code is the hero. Everything else recedes.
Contrast: High contrast for readability, low contrast for secondary UI.
anti_patterns: No centered layouts for code tools.
No decorative gradients that don't serve a function.

context_strategy.visual_mood: Dark, Neon Accents, Glassmorphic overlays, Sharp borders

headings.usage: Page titles, Modal headers, Section labels

typography.rules: Avoid 'Inter'. Use 'Space Grotesk' for a technical feel in headers. Code font MUST be monospaced.

primary.name: Electric Blaze
primary.usage: Primary Actions (Run Code, Join Voice, Deploy)

secondary.name: Volt Blue
secondary.usage: Selection states, Active tabs, Focus rings

colors.contrast_rules: Text must meet APCA standards. Interactive elements must have 3:1 contrast against background.

dashboard.rules: Project cards vary in size. Recent projects get larger 'Hero' slots.

editor.behavior: Collapsible sidebars. Main editor takes remaining width.

spacing.containers: Containers with borders must have p-6 or p-8 padding.

layout.alignment: Left-align text. Optical alignment for icons + text (add right padding to icon).

cards.classes: bg-background/40 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/10 shadow-sm hover:border-white/20 transition-all duration-300

inputs.classes: bg-transparent border-b border-white/20 focus:border-primary focus:ring-0 rounded-none px-0 py-2 transition-colors placeholder:text-muted-foreground/50
inputs.label_style: uppercase text-xs tracking-wider text-muted-foreground mb-1 block

voice_panel.user_avatar: rounded-full ring-2 ring-transparent data-[speaking=true]:ring-success transition-all duration-100

motion.micro_interactions: Active states should have instant feedback (scale 0.98 on press).

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text is legible on dark backgrounds. Use lighter greys (e.g., #E5E5E5) for body text.
accessibility.focus: Visible focus rings in 'Volt Blue' for keyboard navigation.
accessibility.screen_readers: All icon-only buttons must have aria-label.

tech_stack_specifics.shadcn_overrides: Force 'radius' to 0.3rem or 0px for a sharper look. Override default 'slate' colors with 'zinc' or custom 'obsidian' palette.
tech_stack_specifics.tailwind_config: Add 'animate-in' plugins. Extend colors with 'electric-blaze' and 'volt-blue'.
tech_stack_specifics.react_components: Use functional components with hooks. Use 'Sonner' for toasts.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement a 'Dark Mode' toggle but default to Dark.
Use the provided image URLs for user avatars and project backgrounds.
For the Voice Channel, create a floating panel or sidebar that uses the 'Glassmorphic' style.
The Code Editor area must be the focal point - minimalist, distraction-free.
Use 'JetBrains Mono' for all code related text.
Ensure all interactive elements have 'data-testid' attributes.
Do NOT use gradients for backgrounds, only for borders or subtle glows.
universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
Do NOT apply universal transition (transition: all).
Do NOT center align the app container.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
